notFound.title: Object not found
notFound.desc: "{{id}}" doesn't match any object in the catalog.

sections.seeOthersDesc: Browse real images of this target from astrophotographers using gear like yours. Coming soon.
sections.communityDesc: Share your shots, tips and notes on this target. Coming soon.

scope.long: Long focal length SCT or large Newtonian
scope.standardDesc: {{name}} sits in the mid-range angular size — a 400–800mm focal length refractor or small Newtonian frames it nicely.
scope.wideDesc: {{name}} spans a large area of sky ({{size}}′). A short focal length refractor (200–500mm) is required to fit it in the frame.
scope.longDesc: {{name}} is small ({{size}}′). A long focal length scope (1200mm+) like an SCT or large Newtonian reveals its details.

camera.label: Cooled dedicated astro camera
camera.desc: For long exposures on {{name}}, a cooled astrophotography camera (mono or one-shot color) keeps thermal noise low.

mount.label: Tracking equatorial mount
mount.desc: {{name}} requires accurate tracking — an equatorial mount sized for your scope's weight is essential.

filter.narrowDesc: {{name}} responds well to narrowband filters ({{filter}}) — they isolate emission lines and cut through moonlight.
filter.broadDesc: {{name}} benefits from a broadband light-pollution filter ({{filter}}) to boost contrast under city skies.
filter.defaultWithFilter: For {{name}}, the recommended filter is {{filter}}. Browse compatible options in the catalog.
filter.defaultNoFilter: A light pollution filter improves contrast on {{name}} from suburban skies.
